import React, { useState } from 'react'; import Sidebar from '../components/Sidebar'; import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext'; const Profile = () => { const { user, updateUser } = useAuth(); const [isEditing, setIsEditing] = useState(false); const [formData, setFormData] = useState({ name: user?.name || '', email: user?.email || '', phone: user?.phone || '', address: user?.address || '', dateOfBirth: user?.dateOfBirth || '', licenseNumber: user?.licenseNumber || '' }); const [message, setMessage] = useState({ type: '', text: '' }); const handleChange = (e) => { const { name, value } = e.target; setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, [name]: value })); }; const handleSubmit = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); // Simulate profile update updateUser(formData); setMessage({ type: 'success', text: 'Profile updated successfully!' }); setIsEditing(false); setTimeout(() => { setMessage({ type: '', text: '' }); }, 3000); }; const handleCancel = () => { setFormData({ name: user?.name || '', email: user?.email || '', phone: user?.phone || '', address: user?.address || '', dateOfBirth: user?.dateOfBirth || '', licenseNumber: user?.licenseNumber || '' }); setIsEditing(false); }; return (

My Profile

Manage your personal information

{message.text && (
{message.text}
)}
{/* Profile Header */}
{user?.name?.charAt(0).toUpperCase() || 'U'}

{user?.name || 'User'}

{user?.email || 'user@example.com'}

Premium Member
{/* Profile Form */}
{isEditing ? (
) : (
Full Name {user?.name || 'Not set'}
Email Address {user?.email || 'Not set'}
Phone Number {formData.phone || 'Not set'}
Address {formData.address || 'Not set'}
Date of Birth {formData.dateOfBirth || 'Not set'}
Driver's License {formData.licenseNumber || 'Not set'}
Account Type Premium Member
)}
{/* Change Password Section */}

Change Password

); }; export default Profile;
